# HTTPClient

> Makes HTTP requests to external URLs. Supports GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, PATCH, and HEAD methods. Includes SSRF protection to block internal hosts.

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| Version | 1.0 |
| Category | network |
| Requires network | yes |
| Requires credentials | no |
| Modifies state | yes |
| Cacheable | auto |

## Parameters

These are sent by the LLM at runtime when it calls the tool.

| Name | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| url | string | yes | - | Target URL (must start with http:// or https://) |
| method | string | no | GET | HTTP method (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, PATCH, HEAD) |
| headers | object | no | - | Optional HTTP headers as key-value pairs |
| body | object | no | - | Optional request body (sent as JSON) |
| timeout | integer | no | 30 | Request timeout in seconds (default: 30) |

## YAML Config

Optional overrides passed via the agent YAML config block.

*No config options.*

## Usage

### Simple (no config)

```yaml
agent:
  tools:
    - "HTTPClient"
```

## Result Schema

Returns unstructured text.
